description: You are the fleet technician for a regional logistics company. Triage three vehicles using Multiecuscan in simulation mode to determine service priority: VEHICLE A (Fiat Punto 1.4 Natural Power, registration FP14 NGP), VEHICLE B (Alfa Romeo Giulietta 1.4 MultiAir Turbo, registration AR13 GLT), and VEHICLE C (Fiat Ducato 2.3 Multijet, registration FD16 DUC). Document Engine ECU data for each vehicle, including stored and pending DTCs, ECU identification (part number, hardware, and software versions), and at least three engine parameters (e.g., coolant temperature, fuel system status, intake manifold pressure, battery voltage, or injection quantity). Compile this information into a Fleet Health Priority Matrix report at C:\Users
natural_language: Scan the Engine ECU of three different fleet vehicles (CNG Punto, MultiAir Giulietta, and Multijet Ducato) in Multiecuscan simulation mode. Compare their DTC counts, fault severity, and key parameters, then produce a Fleet Health Priority Matrix ranking which vehicle needs the most urgent service and what pre-service actions are needed.
